question.text:
Dear Finn

Dear Catherine

Good day,

 

May I suggest below :

 

1 – since the problem is that EGALYT05 and EGALYT02 are in same location which is EGALY , maybe we can create a different location for example named EGEDK that refers to Dekhela port and record the EGALYT05 under EGEDK location , then we can fix the ocean route problem 

 

2 – as I know that all T/S cost occurred at EGALYT05 is under our partner liability , so we can totally ignore the VD-TS-VL moves that actually happened in EGALYT05 and keep the POD as EGALYT02 and insert only VD-IC at EGALYT02 when containers actually discharge as full import

 

Pls check above suggestions and advise if any of them is suitable , personally I would prefer the first one as it may be more practical if we faced similar

answer.text:
Dear Finn,

 

Since EGALYT05 and EGALYT02 is under same location EGALY, so impossible to create an ocean(trunk or feeder) link between 2 them.

If the Delivery Term of the bookings can change to CY, then we can create a inland link of EGALYT05-EGALYT02 (similar as carrier’s haulage route) , if it must be Free Out term at EGALY, then the route only can be POL=CNTAOT02 ~POD=EGALYT05.  As for the movements, Terminal T/S costs and feeder charge if any, it has to be settled manually.
